summary_en: OHMORIYA completed acquisition of 15,700 shares (0.32% of outstanding) for ¥14.3M via ToSTNeT-3, ending the buyback program authorized on 18 May 2026.
title_en: Notice of Completion of Acquisition of Treasury Stock and Termination of Acquisition through Off-Auction Trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: OHMORIYA Co., Ltd. announced on 19 May 2026 the completion of its treasury stock acquisition program. The company acquired 15,700 shares of its own common stock for a total consideration of ¥14,287,000 via off-auction trading (ToSTNeT-3) on the Tokyo Stock Exchange on 19 May 2026. This represents 0.32% of outstanding shares (excluding treasury stock). The acquisition was conducted pursuant to a Board of Directors resolution adopted on 18 May 2026. The stated purpose is to enable flexible capital policy in response to changes in the management environment. The buyback has now been concluded, having been authorized for a maximum of 20,000 shares and ¥18.2M.
